title: Elbaf’s Hidden Corners
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Loki, Hajrudin, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Zoro, Luffy as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Loki, you no good--

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Go ahead and try something, HAJRUDIN!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doga HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way you can stop me... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: None of you can even lift RAGNIR!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't let you turn anyone else in the sun realm into a victim!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, there will be victims! The flames are already spreading!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now choose!!! Surrender your weapons and let me go, or...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, what's the deal with this monstrous giant?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He's injured, if we don't help he'll...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Will you let everyone die!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll slaughter every last weaking in the sun realm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...If you don't answer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wait!! We get it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GRIN...

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Don't fall for it, hajrudin!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: RORONOA ZORO?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I guess there's no choice... I promised...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If you did anything, I'd drop you!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wait, straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He'll Zap you if you get near!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I SEE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So that's your answer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no turning back from a crime like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: Just stop, LOK!! Think of the children!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy!! Are you gonna let him off easy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His wounds are about to open up again anyway!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Gum- gum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Heh heh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: DAM... I guess I lose this round...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: arm balloon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WHA!!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
